summary: Phase 2 CTAs & Conversion Testing Complete. All 8 features verified and working correctly: topic-specific CTAs, sticky CTA on scroll, View Profile buttons, testimonial CTA, AppFooter integration, logo size, and See More button.

sticky_cta_hidden_at_top.verification: Sticky CTA hidden at page top (no 'visible' class)

sticky_cta_appears_on_scroll.verification: Sticky CTA visible after scrolling 800px ('visible' class added)

sticky_cta_phone_icon.verification: Phone icon SVG present in sticky CTA button

expert_view_profile_buttons.verification: 4 'View Profile' buttons found on expert cards with correct text

testimonial_cta.verification: CTA button 'Start Your Journey Today' visible (data-testid='testimonial-cta-btn')

app_footer_integration.verification: HomeScreen.jsx line 488 integrates AppFooter component. AppFooter.jsx line 11 has 'hidden md:block' (desktop only)

mobile_sticky_cta.verification: Sticky CTA visible on mobile (390px viewport) after scroll

mobile_menu_button.verification: Mobile hamburger menu button visible on 390px viewport

test_credentials.note: Google OAuth required for authenticated HomeScreen. AppFooter integration verified via code review.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 CTAs & Conversion complete. All topic-specific CTAs (Talk about Career, Talk about Health, Explore Marriage, Plan Family), sticky CTA (Ready to find clarity? + Get Free 10-Min Call), View Profile buttons on expert cards, testimonial CTA (Start Your Journey Today), See More life topics button, and AppFooter on HomeScreen (desktop only) are working correctly. Header logo 36px fix from Phase 1 is confirmed working.
